$comment: ProducerStack carrier-sender-and-type map. Discovered from Jace's Gmail inbox on 2026-07-08. Match order: lowercase From address against from_pattern; if multiple rows match or subject_pattern is set, apply subject regex. No matching row => not a carrier email, ignore. Unknown sender at a known carrier domain => log as 'unclassified' and send to review queue (see fallback_domains).

senders.notes: Personal underwriter addresses (e.g. aubrey.street-mccarthy@mutualofomaha.com) that vary per case; body contains File Number, Insured, Plan, Face Amount, Underwriter. Subject carries file # + insured last name.
New e-app submitted confirmation; policy # in subject and body.
sample_subjects: New E-App Submitted Larry  Didlo -Policy # BU6691749

senders.notes: One-time login verification codes.
Contracting forms (attached PDFs). Not policy/commission data.
sample_subjects: Mutual of Omaha and Affiliates Transfer Request Form

senders.notes: Account setup notices.
Contracting document notices.

Case management: initial/outstanding/additional requirements, approved other-than-applied, closed incomplete. File # in body; POLICY NUMBER IS MASKED in subject/body as xxxxx76911 (last-5 matching required). Occasionally has PDF attachments from human case managers.
sample_subjects: Initial Requirements PROPOSED INSURED: WINGLER, POLICY #: xxxxx76911  (JACE FRENKEL) MLSR201938
Outstanding Requirements PROPOSED INSURED: WINGLER, POLICY #: xxxxx76911  (JACE FRENKEL) MLSR201938
Approved Other Than Applied PROPOSED INSURED: WINGLER, POLICY #: xxxxx76911  (JACE FRENKEL) MLSR201938

senders.notes: Application received confirmations.
sample_subjects: Application Received PROPOSED INSURED: WINGLER, POLICY #: xxxxx76911  (JACE FRENKEL) MLSR201938

senders.notes: FE Express payment lifecycle. Some are addressed to the client with agent cc'd — parse the client name from body, not the To header.
FE Express instant-decision outcomes, mostly declines with reason in body. Client name in subject.

senders.subject_pattern: (Your Policy Documents Are Ready|Your Application Is Ready to Review)
senders.notes: Policy in-force / documents ready. Often sent to client with agent cc'd.

Zix 'ZSecure' contracting/commission-level notices — data IS in the body despite the secure branding; commission schedule attached as PDF. Also state appointment confirmations (those can be ignored downstream by event_type).
Surveys.
sample_subjects: Tell Us - How Was Your Experience

senders.notes: Login codes and portal account notices.
sample_subjects: Here's Your Transamerica Security Validation Code

senders.notes: Auto-replies confirming receipt of emails you sent.
Sales-rep marketing from personal addresses on the sales subdomain. Discovered via review queue 2026-07-08.
SIWL/GIWL new business team: returned payments, reissue instructions, beneficiary processes. Policy #, client, agent # in subject and body. Sometimes attaches forms (PDF).
Cisco Secure Message envelope — ZERO data in the email; 'Read Message' link requires login and expires in 30 days. Never fetch the link.
Account activation codes.
sample_subjects: Corebridge Financial | Activate/Verify your user account

senders.notes: Surveys.
sample_subjects: Tell me about your latest Corebridge Financial experience

senders.notes: Daily digest: commission activity summary, commission balance, AML expiration, pending-app counts, issued-not-paid and lapse-pending COUNTS (counts only — per-policy lapse detail is portal). Full statement is behind portal.americoagent.com. Lapse-pending count > 0 should also raise a policy_tracker flag.

Per-client Agent Portal notification. Body has owner (client) name, date, and a link LABEL (e.g. 'Adverse Decision') — capture both via regex for the nudge text; details require portal login. NOTE: same mailbox localpart as noreply@americo.com differs only by case — matching must be case-insensitive and rely on the subject patterns to separate this row from Daily Update.
sample_subjects: Americo - New Notification Regarding Michael Kjenstad

senders.notes: Agent debt/chargeback balance notices with dollar amount in body.
Marketing/training.
sample_subjects: Take Your Americo Business to the Next Level

senders.notes: Marketing (personal sender).
Marketing ('Monday Minute').
sample_subjects: Ready to Simplify Your Sales Process?

senders.notes: Marketing (personal sender).

Daily digest of application status changes: SUBMITTED / ISSUED AS APPLIED FOR / ISSUED OTHER THAN APPLIED FOR / DECLINED / WITHDRAWN, each with policy # + client name. One email can contain MULTIPLE policies — parser must return an array of events. Sender arrives as NOREPLY@aatx.com (uppercase) for this type; match case-insensitively and split on subject.
Automatic payment not honored: policy #, client, amount paid to date, return reason in body; agent # + policy # in subject.
Agent portal login/verification codes (same address as APPLICATION ACTIVITY / Returned Payment; split on subject). Discovered via review queue 2026-07-08.
Agent welcome / admin.
Constant Contact marketing (office hours, holiday closures).

senders.subject_pattern: (complete their insurance application|application is almost done)
senders.notes: Incomplete-application nudges with client name in subject/body. Ethos is portal-first: no policy-status or commission-statement emails observed. This sender mixes marketing and transactional — subject allowlist required; default is ignore.
sample_subjects: Help Jon Ellison complete their insurance application
Jon Ellison's application is almost done

senders.notes: Compensation processing notices (e.g. holiday ACH delays). Informational, no per-policy data.
sample_subjects: Ethos Independence Day compensation processing update

senders.notes: DEFAULT for this sender (lowest match priority): marketing, masterclasses, product promos.
sample_subjects: Join the Ethos masterclass and unlock your potential

senders.notes: Login codes, device-trusted confirmations.

key_findings: No carrier currently sends commission statements as PDF attachments. Americo's Daily Update (body digest) is the only recurring commission email. Transamerica attaches commission SCHEDULES (rank changes) as PDF.
Transamerica masks policy numbers as xxxxx76911 — matching must support last-5-digits lookup.
American-Amicable uses the same address (noreply@aatx.com, case varies) for two different email types — subject regex is mandatory.
Ethos mixes marketing and transactional mail on one sender — subject allowlist with ignore-by-default.
Mutual of Omaha underwriting emails come from PERSONAL underwriter addresses that vary per case — match on domain + subject pattern.
Some Transamerica FE Express emails are addressed To the client with the agent cc'd — extract client identity from the body, not headers.
Corebridge secure messages and Americo portal notifications are the two login-link/nudge cases.
